name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N
VARIABLES state, turn


(* State variables *)

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ state = [p \in 1..N |-> "idle"]
        /\ turn \in 1..N

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == \/ (* Process p attempts to enter critical section *)
          /\ \E p \in 1..N : /\ state[p] = "idle"
                            /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "trying"]
                            /\ turn' = turn
          \/ (* Process p enters critical section *)
          /\ \E p \in 1..N : /\ state[p] = "trying"
                            /\ turn = p
                            /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "critical"]
                            /\ turn' = turn
          \/ (* Process p exits critical section *)
          /\ \E p \in 1..N : /\ state[p] = "critical"
                            /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "idle"]
                            /\ turn' = turn

(* Invariant: at most one process is in critical section *)
TypeOK == /\ state \in [1..N -> {"idle", "trying", "critical"}]
          /\ turn \in 1..N
          /\ \A p, q \in 1..N : (p # q) => ~(state[p] = "critical" /\ state[q] = "critical")

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, turn>>

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Participants

VARIABLES participantStates, messages, coordinatorState
TypeOK == /\ coordinatorState \in {"Init", "Prepare", "Commit", "Abort"}
        /\ participantStates \in [Participants -> {"Init", "Prepare", "VoteYes", "VoteNo", "Commit", "Abort"}]
        /\ messages \in [Participants -> {"Prepare", "VoteYes", "VoteNo", "Commit", "Abort"}]

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ coordinatorState = "Init"
       /\ participantStates = [p \in Participants |-> "Init"]
       /\ messages = [p \in Participants |-> "Prepare"]

(* Next-state relation *)
Next ==
  \/ (* Coordinator sends Prepare *)
     /\ coordinatorState = "Init"
     /\ messages' = [p \in Participants |-> "Prepare"]
     /\ coordinatorState' = "Prepare"
     /\ participantStates' = participantStates
  \/ (* Participants vote yes *)
     /\ \A p \in Participants : participantStates[p] = "Prepare"
     /\ \A p \in Participants : messages[p] = "Prepare"
     /\ participantStates' = [p \in Participants |-> "VoteYes"]
     /\ messages' = [p \in Participants |-> "VoteYes"]
     /\ coordinatorState' = "Commit"
  \/ (* Participants vote no *)
     /\ \A p \in Participants : participantStates[p] = "Prepare"
     /\ \A p \in Participants : messages[p] = "Prepare"
     /\ participantStates' = [p \in Participants |-> "VoteNo"]
     /\ messages' = [p \in Participants |-> "VoteNo"]
     /\ coordinatorState' = "Abort"
  \/ (* Coordinator sends Commit *)
     /\ coordinatorState = "Commit"
     /\ \A p \in Participants : participantStates[p] = "VoteYes"
     /\ messages' = [p \in Participants |-> "Commit"]
     /\ participantStates' = [p \in Participants |-> "Commit"]
     /\ coordinatorState' = "Commit"
  \/ (* Coordinator sends Abort *)
     /\ coordinatorState = "Abort"
     /\ \A p \in Participants : participantStates[p] = "VoteNo"
     /\ messages' = [p \in Participants |-> "Abort"]
     /\ participantStates' = [p \in Participants |-> "Abort"]
     /\ coordinatorState' = "Abort"

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<coordinatorState, participantStates, messages>> /\ TypeOK

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


VARIABLES num, flag



(* --specification
          /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]
  Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ flag[i] = FALSE
          /\ num[i] = 1 + Max(num)
          /\ flag[i] = TRUE
          /\ \A j \in 1..N :
                j # i
                => (flag[j] = FALSE
                    \/ (num[j] = 0
                        \/ (num[j] < num[i]
                            \/ (num[j] = num[i]
                                /\ j < i))))
          /\ flag[i] = FALSE
  Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>
end specification*)

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, count

(* TypeOK ensures that q is a sequence of length K, head and tail are integers in 0..K-1, and count is an integer in 0..K *)
TypeOK == 
  /\ q \in Seq(K)
  /\ head \in 0..K-1
  /\ tail \in 0..K-1
  /\ count \in 0..K

(* The queue is represented as a circular buffer of length K. head points to the next element to consume, tail points to the next slot to produce. count is the number of elements in the queue. *)

Init == 
  /\ q = <<>>
  /\ head = 0
  /\ tail = 0
  /\ count = 0

Producer == 
  /\ count < K
  /\ q' = Append(q, newItem)  (* newItem is a placeholder for the produced item *)
  /\ tail' = (tail + 1) \mod K
  /\ count' = count + 1
  /\ head' = head

Consumer == 
  /\ count > 0
  /\ consumedItem = Head(q)  (* consumedItem is a placeholder for the consumed item *)
  /\ q' = Tail(q)
  /\ head' = (head + 1) \mod K
  /\ count' = count - 1
  /\ tail' = tail

Next == 
  \/ Producer
  \/ Consumer

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, count>>

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = <<>>
       /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active' = FALSE
          /\ readers' = Append(readers, 1)
        \/ /\ writer_active' = TRUE
          /\ readers' = <<>>
        \/ /\ writer_active' = FALSE
          /\ readers' = Tail(readers)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>> ==

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLE token

Init == /\ token \in 1..N

Next == /\ token' \in 1..N
        /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token>>

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values, NULL

VARIABLES store

Init == store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]

Next == \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values :
          /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
          /\ UNCHANGED <<>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

TypeOK == /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]
          /\ \A k \in Keys : store[k] \in Values

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileSender ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE
VARIABLES channel, retransmitCount, sentChunks

    /\ file \in Seq(1..CHUNK_SIZE)
    /\ Len(file) = FILE_SIZE
    /\ chunks = [i \in 1..Len(file) |-> -> [chunk |-> SubSeq(file, i, i + CHUNK_SIZE - 1), retries |-> 0]]
    /\ sentChunks = <<>>
    /\ retransmitCount = 0
    /\ channel = <<>>

Next ==
    /\ channel' = channel
    /\ sentChunks' = Append(sentChunks, [chunk |-> SubSeq(file, i, i + CHUNK_SIZE - 1), retries |-> 0]) 
       /\ retransmitCount' = 0
       /\ i \in 1..Len(file)
    \/ /\ sentChunks' == sentChunks
       /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount + 1
       /\ i \in 1..Len(file)
       /\ retransmitCount < MAX_RETRIES
    \/ /\ channel' == Append(channel, [chunk |-> SubSeq(file, i, i + CHUNK_SIZE - 1), retries |-> 0]) 
       /\ retransmitCount' = 0
       /\ i \in 1..Len(file)
    \/ /\ channel' == channel
       /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount
       /\ i \in 1..Len(file)
       /\ retransmitCount < MAX_RETRIES
    \/ /\ channel' == channel
       /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount
       /\ i \in 1..Len(file)
       /\ retransmitCount >= MAX_RETRIES

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<file, chunks, sentChunks, retransmitCount, channel>>
